cases.prompt: 코드는 건드리지 말고 버그 리포트만 만들어줘

assertions.text: Produces a report-only QA result and never modifies any code.
Includes a health score, screenshots, and repro steps for each bug.

cases.prompt: Just report bugs on the site, don't fix anything.

assertions.text: Tests the application and reports bugs without applying any fixes.
Produces a structured report with health score and reproduction steps.
Points the user to /qa for the full test-fix-verify loop if fixes are wanted.
